queries.sql: SELECT `p`.*, `b`.*, `pl`.*, `pm`.`model`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pm2.model) AS additional_models FROM `_product` `p` LEFT JOIN `_product_priceLevel` `pl` ON `pl`.`product_id`=`p`.`product_id` LEFT JOIN `_brand` `b` USING (`brand_id`) LEFT JOIN `_product_model` `pm` ON `pm`.`product_model_id` IN ( p.model_id,model2_id, p.model3_id) LEFT JOIN `_product_model` `pm2` ON `pm2`.`product_model_id` IN ( p.model2_id, p.model3_id) LEFT JOIN `_product_model_var` `pmv` ON `p`.`model_var_id_year`=`pmv`.`product_model_var_id` INNER JOIN `_product_sites` `ps` ON `ps`.`product_id`=`p`.`product_id` WHERE ( `ps`.`sp_site_id` = '3' AND `ps`.`visibility_type` IN (0,1) ) AND ( `pl`.`cenaKKC` IS NOT NULL OR `pl`.`zavishena_zena` != "" and `pl`.`is_promo` = 1 ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%Ремонтен%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%Ремонтен%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%Ремонтен%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%Ремонтен%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%Ремонтен%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%Ремонтен%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%комплект%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%комплект%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%комплект%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%комплект%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%комплект%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%комплект%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%Стъклоподемник%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%Стъклоподемник%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%Стъклоподемник%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%Стъклоподемник%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%Стъклоподемник%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%Стъклоподемник%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%за%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%Hyundai%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%Hyundai%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%Hyundai%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%Hyundai%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%Hyundai%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%Hyundai%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%Tucson%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%Tucson%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%Tucson%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%Tucson%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%Tucson%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%Tucson%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%MK3%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%MK3%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%MK3%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%MK3%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%MK3%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%MK3%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%-%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%-%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%-%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%-%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%-%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%-%' ESCAPE '!' ) AND ( `p`.`product_name` LIKE '%предна%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`oem` LIKE '%предна%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`upc` LIKE '%предна%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%предна%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%предна%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`ean` LIKE '%лява%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod` LIKE '%лява%' ESCAPE '!' OR `p`.`kod_dostavchik` LIKE '%лява%' ESCAPE '!' ) GROUP BY `p`.`product_id`
